Li Yu ÊùéÁéâ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Yu (ÊùéÁéâ)was born in Yuzhang. Leader of bandits in the east of Poyang, destroyed by He Qi. Li Yu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
